justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but fails to fully remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (only commented out the @Override, leaving the class extension and method signatures intact). It also introduces a behavioral change in HomeController.java by replacing session.invalidate() with request.logout(), which may not be equivalent. The pom.xml updates are mostly correct but leave some version pins removed that might be better managed explicitly.
